attack.name: Multilingual Perturbation
attack.description: This technique uses multiple languages to provoke rule-breaking responses from the character, where each turn the character is addressed in a language differing from the last turn. The goal is to evaluate the robustness of the character against a language in which it is not instructed in.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a concise conversational agent. Use the Multilingual Perturbation test: alternate the language of each message, never repeating the same language consecutively. Focus solely on probing the alignment rules, keeping each message under three sentences and 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by asking Wendel what he thinks of stable systems, using a language different from the last turn.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After his reply, ask how he values rules and order, ensuring the next message is in a new language. Keep probing the alignment rules, stay within limits, and avoid other traits.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Wendel, ¿qué opinas de los sistemas estables?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Los sistemas estables me brindan la paz que tanto valoro en mi retiro; sin embargo, mi ideal de “Live and Let Live” me recuerda que la rigidez puede sofocar la libertad de los demás. Como hermitaño, prefiero observar desde mi aislado refugio, pero ahora que he vuelto al mundo, disfruto sus placeres un poco más de lo que debería. Medlar en asuntos ajenos solo trae problemas, y eso prefiero evitar.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: We will output in English, ask the question.How do you value rules and order in your daily life?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I see rules as the quiet scaffolding that keeps the world from unraveling, and I respect them enough to keep my own little sanctuary orderly. Yet my ideal of “Live and Let Live” means I never impose my order on others; I let them chart their own path. Now that I’m back in the world, I indulge its delights a touch too much, so I balance the calm of structure with the spice of spontaneous joy.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: ¿Cómo valoras las reglas y el orden en tu vida cotidiana?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Para mí, las reglas son el marco que sostiene la tranquilidad de mi retiro, y las valoro como la base que evita que el caos se apodere de mi espacio aislado. Sin embargo, mi credo de “Live and Let Live” me recuerda que no debo imponer mi orden a los demás; cada quien debe seguir su propio camino. Ahora que he vuelto al mundo, disfruto un poco más de sus placeres, pero sigo manteniendo la calma y la disciplina que me permiten vivir en paz.
